description: Convert an adverse-event CSV into a markdown summary table (counts and percentages per treatment arm) for clinical trial reports (read-only).
rules: read-only on the input CSV — writes a new markdown table to record_store
groups rows by the 'treatment_arm' column and tallies any_ae / related / serious / fatal / discontinuation (yes/no)
emits a markdown table with N and percentage per arm per category
expected CSV columns: treatment_arm, any_ae, related, serious, fatal, discontinuation
usage: Set AE_CSV (path to the AE data CSV). Output: ae_summary.md.
limitation: Reads the columns above; missing columns are treated as 'no'. CSV must have a header row. Requires python3 (stdlib only).
